Ironclad Total cards: 90 Press Q to view upgraded cards
Help

Hover a card to reveal quick actions. Click the card art for full details.

  • Compare: add card to pick comparison
  • Deck: add card to current deck
  • B / N / F: Base power, Need match, Fit
  • Q: toggle upgraded card view
